_meta.description: Manually trigger a new workflow from the Workflows page by clicking 'Start a Workflow'.

verificationStrategy.pre: perceive workflows page; confirm 'Start a Workflow' button is visible
verificationStrategy.post: perceive modal or next form that opens after clicking 'Start a Workflow'

notes: This payload opens the 'Start a Workflow' modal. The modal contents were not surveyed.
A perceive step after clicking the button captures the modal form for subsequent self-improvement.
The /workflows page redirects to a filtered URL: /workflows/?filters=(workflow-status = 'STAGED' OR ...)
No data-cy selectors were confirmed on this page — button text selectors used at 0.8 confidence.
_meta.title: Start a Workflow

base_url.description: Base URL for the YeshID instance

start-workflow-button.resolvedVia: live-survey button text (no data-cy on /workflows page)

chain.note: HOME START: Navigate to overview dashboard before performing action.
Confirm authenticated — username widget must be visible.
Navigate to Workflows page. Page redirects to filtered URL automatically.

chain.description: Verify workflows page is loaded; confirm 'Start a Workflow' button is present in header
chain.note: Perceive to confirm page load and locate button if cachedSelector fails.
Click 'Start a Workflow' to open the workflow creation modal.

chain.description: Capture the contents of the 'Start a Workflow' modal — record all fields, dropdowns, buttons, and data-cy attributes present
chain.note: LEARNING STEP: This modal was not surveyed. Perceive captures its structure for self-improvement and future payload authoring.
HOME END: Return to overview. Modal is dismissed by navigation.

chain.description: Independent confirmation: verify workflow creation modal or form is visible after clicking Start a Workflow
